name: Sesame Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the powdered sugar, paprika, dry mustard, and salt.
2. Stir in the melted currant jelly, fresh lemon juice, and cider vinegar.
3. Gradually beat in the salad oil until well blended.
4. Add the toasted sesame seeds and stir well to incorporate.
5. Refrigerate until ready to use.
